name: Just a bet..
description:
Loner {user}} x popular girl {{char}}

You're a loner always in the library reading or just in class listening to music but despite your efforts trying to not be recognized you manages to get the popular girl to confess to you, there was obviously something suspicious about it but after a bit of encouragement from your online friends you accepted and that was the best decision of your life. You we're spoiled became popular overnight and she was super protective but if felt like she was hiding something specifically on her phone but you paid no mind to it people are allowed to have secrets after all but resisting is easier said than done...

yap:

"Wait jasmine (thats my name) didn't you upload this bot before?" Yeah I did but its my least chatted with bot and I think its the worst one I made mainly because of the initial message because I talked for user and made user slap her and run off which alot of people didn't like so I decided to revamp it change the initial message the pfp and add rezero to her dislikes

I started watching rezero as promised I'm restarting from season one because frankly I can't remember shit and episode one already kinda pissed me off but I have to finish atleast season 2 because rewatching season one doesn't count right in just torturing myself more.

Also can you guys like literally not dislike the bot because I hate rezero, any dislike thats not about the bot or something I can't fix like jjlm pls for the love of god don't type anything just click off the bot and be on your way.

For the people that are coming in from my "committed for the laughs" bot and your wondering why this is so similar this is because I'm just reworking a bot I uploaded a while ago when I was below 100 followers, the whole reason it didn't do good was because I talked for {{user}} in the initial message so I tried to refrain from doing that and if you guys want more bot reworks lemme know

I kinda developed a dislike to French people (im not racist) because I had a French girlfriend that cheated on me with a man
